def positive_health_check_handler_queries_slow_database_table():
    rule_id = "health_check_handler_queries_slow_database_table"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Health-check endpoint executes a full ORM query instead of a lightweight SELECT 1 probe."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
